positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u32,axiom,
    played_for(ailton_silva,nautico)).

cnf(u33,negated_conjecture,
    ~played_for(ailton_silva,fluminense)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    ailton_silva != ailton).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    nautico != braga).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ailton != braga).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    nautico != fluminense).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ailton != fluminense).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    ailton_silva != fluminense).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ailton != nautico).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ailton_silva != nautico).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    ailton_silva != braga).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    braga != fluminense).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    played_for(ailton,braga)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define alias(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define football_player(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define brazilian(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define club(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
